nasb.text: Now they were all weeping and lamenting for her; but He said, “Stop weeping, for she has not died, but is asleep.”

esv.text: And all were weeping and mourning for her, but he said, “Do not weep, for she is not dead but sleeping.”

cnv.text: 眾人都在為女孩痛哭哀號，他說：“不要哭！她不是死了，而是睡著了。”

ccb.text: 屋内的人都在为那女孩哀伤哭泣，耶稣说：“不要哭，她没有死，只是睡着了。”

csbs.text: 大家都在为那女孩捶胸哀哭。耶稣说：“不要哭！她不是死了，而是睡了。”
